title: Young America
writer: John Frederick Ballard, William M. Conselman
actors: Spencer Tracy, Doris Kenyon, Tommy Conlon
plot: Already in trouble with the law, Arthur and his friend Nutty break into a drugstore to get medicine for Nutty's grandmother. The druggist's wife, Mrs. Doray, asks for custody. When he hears them arguing over him, Arthur runs away....
